channel.title: Crypto Market on TB Pro Invest
channel.description: Recent content in Crypto Market on TB Pro Invest

item.title: Binance fine of 4,2 billon
item.description: Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange, will pay the largest fine in history.

item.title: Expectations from the crypto market and bitcoin in 2024
item.description: Recently, Bitcoin reached levels of over 40,000 EUR, although until recently the price was at a modest level of 15,000 EUR.
